testcase.name: Test A: Mock Job Site Application › should navigate to application form
testcase.system-out: [Mock Server] Server started on port 9393 [Job Application E2E] Mock server ready at http://localhost:9393

testcase.name: Test A: Mock Job Site Application › should auto-fill form fields using data-auto-fill attributes
Test A: Mock Job Site Application › should fill and submit application successfully
Test A: Mock Job Site Application › should validate required fields before submission
Test A: Mock Job Site Application › should handle job-specific application URL
Test B: File Upload › should display file upload area
Test B: File Upload › should select and upload resume file
Test B: File Upload › should upload file and submit application
Test B: File Upload › should show file info after selection
Test C: Multi-Step Form › should display step indicator with 4 steps
Test C: Multi-Step Form › should complete step 1 (Personal Info)
Test C: Multi-Step Form › should complete step 2 (Education)
Test C: Multi-Step Form › should complete step 3 (Experience)
Test C: Multi-Step Form › should navigate back from step 2 to step 1
Test C: Multi-Step Form › should review and submit from step 4
Test C: Multi-Step Form › should show submit button only on final step
Test D: Error Handling › should handle 500 server error
Test D: Error Handling › should retry on transient failure
Test D: Error Handling › should capture screenshot on page error
Test D: Error Handling › should handle network timeout gracefully
Test D: Error Handling › should display error message to user
Test E: Stealth Features Verification › should use realistic user agent
Test E: Stealth Features Verification › should maintain cookie persistence across navigation
Test E: Stealth Features Verification › should add human-like delays between actions
Test E: Stealth Features Verification › should handle same-origin fetch requests
Test F: Full Application Flow Integration › should complete full application flow with all features
Test F: Full Application Flow Integration › should handle multiple rapid submissions correctly
Test F: Full Application Flow Integration › should validate form state persistence across steps
